prompt: I need to add a route on my SLIM node for agent acme/production/assistant/1 that goes via the remote node at http://10.0.0.5:8080. How do I do this with slimctl?

assertions.text: Route is in org/ns/agent/id format: acme/production/assistant/1
References a JSON connection config file (not inline URL)
Shows or mentions the JSON file should contain the endpoint http://10.0.0.5:8080
